title: The Empty Canvas
writer: Alberto Moravia, Damiano Damiani, Roberto De Leonardis
actors: Bette Davis, Horst Buchholz, Catherine Spaak
plot: The son of a dead Italian nobleman and a wealthy American woman forgets the disappointment of finding he has no talent for being a painter by succumbing to the sexual advances of an amoral model who believes in indiscriminate love...
